SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:title: Enable translation
SwitchPreferenceCompat.app:summary: Story list, comments, and reader mode body text using on-device ML Kit. The translate button appears in the bottom sheet when reader mode is active.

ListPreference.app:title: Display mode
ListPreference.app:summary: Bilingual: show original + translation. Overlay: replace original with translation. Applies to story titles, comments, and web page body text.
